message:
fix: executor sandbox comments, fromElements subclass support, line elements

- executor.ts: add eval/Function to shadowed globals, update comments
  to honestly document that new Function() is defense-in-depth not a
  security sandbox (constructor chain escapes are unfixable)
- sdk.ts: fix fromFile() to delegate to this.fromElements() preserving
  subclass support (ConfiguredDiagram.fromFile works correctly now)
- sdk.ts: add this-typed fromElements() for proper subclass instantiation
- sdk.ts: reconstruct line elements in fromElements() instead of
  falling through to passthrough (enables toCode() round-trip for lines)
